headline: Gen Digital (GEN) Faces A New Reality As AI Reshapes Security Markets
summary: Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ:GEN) is among the 14 Most Undervalued Cybersecurity Stocks to Invest In. On April 13, RBC Capital analyst Matthew Hedberg lowered the firm’s price target on Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ:GEN) to $22 from $29 while maintaining a Sector Perform rating, citing weak sentiment across the software sector. The firm pointed to macroeconomic uncertainty, […]
